subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the most inaccessible, most holy court of the Desired One, Who through one blessed word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که بیک کلمه مبارکه شک و ریب و
subcodes.subjects: @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @Manifestation of God as sun, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @differences between the Manifestations; station of distinction, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
